Dear {fullname},

Please renew your certification by visiting: {renewalurl}

Thank you.

entries.name: emailbody
entries.current:
Dear {fullname},

Your certification for the course "{coursename}" will expire on {expirydate} ({daysuntilexpiry} days from now).

Please renew your certification by visiting: {renewalurl}

Thank you.
entries.default:
Dear {fullname},

Your certificate for the course "{coursename}" will expire on {expirydate} ({daysuntilexpiry} days from now).

Renewing is easy — the course is a 2-hour online training you can complete on any device within 30 days of purchase.

Please renew your certification by visiting: {renewalurl}

Thank you.
